bazaars.name: Skill Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: AI Agent Skills (SKILL.md), organized by category.
bazaars.description: An all-in-one open collection of portable Agent Skills from across GitHub and the web.

bazaars.name: MCP Bazaar
bazaars.description: A categorized catalog of MCP servers connecting LLMs to databases, APIs, browsers and more.

bazaars.name: Custom Instruction Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: System prompts & custom instructions for LLMs.
bazaars.description: Curated persona/behavior packs for ChatGPT, Claude Projects, Gemini Gems and more.

bazaars.name: Slash Command Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: Slash commands for Claude Code & other AI CLIs.
bazaars.description: Reusable /command definitions for AI coding tools, by category.

bazaars.name: Free API Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: Free LLM & AI APIs, with their real limits.
bazaars.description: A living directory of free / free-tier LLM, image, audio, video and embedding APIs (formerly 'awesome free LLM API resources').

bazaars.name: Jailbreak Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: LLM red-team techniques + defenses (authorized testing only).
bazaars.description: A defensive security-research catalog of jailbreak/prompt-injection techniques paired with mitigations.
